title: Pleasure Vs Purpose
content: 🎵 PLEASURE VS PURPOSE ======================== 📝 CONCEPT: The tension between hedonism and meaningful living 🎸 INSTRUMENTS - Primary: Piano + Synth - Secondary: 808s, Trap drums - Texture: Dark, moody, introspective 🎤 STYLE - Conscious rap / Trap-influenced - BPM: 75-90 (slow, contemplative) - Mood: Dark, heavy, introspective, then hopeful 🎼 SONG STRUCTURE ------------------ [VERSE 1 - 16 bars] Opening: Acknowledge the pleasure trap Build: The hedonic treadmill metaphor Climax: Why we're stuck seeking pleasure [CHORUS - 8 bars] Hook: "Pleasure fades, purpose stays" Memorable, quotable [VERSE 2 - 16 bars] Deep dive: Neuroscience of dopamine Counter: But meaning creates lasting fulfillment Resolution: How to find purpose [CHORUS x2] [BRIDGE] Shift: What if it's not either/or? Synthesis: Pleasure WITH purpose [OUTRO] Final thought: Purpose is the ultimate high 📝 SUNO PROMPT: ---------------- Philosophical conscious rap with piano and synth. Mood: dark, introspective, heavy. About pleasure vs purpose, hedonism vs meaning. J Cole influence, emotional boom-bap flow.
